mapper.select: SELECT A.WIKI_BKMK_ID AS wikiBkmkId, A.USER_ID AS usid, A.WIKI_BKMK_NM AS wikiBkmkNm, A.FRST_REGISTER_ID AS frstRegisterId, TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS frstRegisterPnttm FROM TB_WIKI_BKMK A WHERE 1=1 AND A.FRST_REGISTER_ID = #{frstRegisterId} ORDER BY A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_WIKI_BKMK WHERE WIKI_BKMK_NM = #{wikiBkmkNm} AND FRST_REGISTER_ID = #{frstRegisterId}
SELECT ESNTL_ID FROM VW_USER_MASTER WHERE ESNTL_ID = #{usid}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_WIKI_BKMK (WIKI_BKMK_ID, USER_ID, WIKI_BKMK_NM, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, FRST_REGISTER_ID) VALUES (#{wikiBkmkId}, #{usid}, #{wikiBkmkNm}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{frstRegisterId})
